Document:
# Station 7 — Server Rules
[bold]Welcome to Station 7.[/bold] Please read and understand these rules before playing. [italic]Admins will treat you as if you have read them, even if you have not.[/italic]
## Core Rules These rules apply at all times, including between rounds.
- [textlink="1. Be Respectful" link="RuleE1"] - [textlink="2. No Griefing" link="RuleE2"] - [textlink="3. Stay In Character" link="RuleE3"] - [textlink="4. Listen To Admins" link="RuleE4"] - [textlink="5. No Cheating or Exploiting" link="RuleE5"] - [textlink="6. No Idling" link="RuleE6"] - [textlink="7. Only Use English" link="RuleE7"] - [textlink="8. MRP" link="RuleE8"]
## Our Philosophy
Station 7 exists because this game is worth playing and worth sharing. These rules are here to keep the experience enjoyable for everyone — not to micromanage how you play or punish you for having fun.
Admins are here to handle genuine problems, not to hover over your shoulder. If you are playing in good faith and having a good time, you will not have a bad time with us.
Play the game. Enjoy the game. That is what this is all about.
